package service

import (
	"context"
	"fmt"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// Positive scenario for service_method_accepts_gin_context:
// service method takes *gin.Context instead of domain inputs plus context.Context.
type InventoryService struct {
	repo InventoryRepository
}

type InventoryRepository interface {
	GetStock(ctx context.Context, sku string) (int, error)
	UpdateStock(ctx context.Context, sku string, quantity int) error
}

func NewInventoryService(repo InventoryRepository) *InventoryService {
	return &InventoryService{repo: repo}
}

func (s *InventoryService) CheckStock(c *gin.Context) error {
	sku := c.Param("sku")
	if sku == "" {
		c.JSON(400, gin.H{"error": "sku parameter required"})
		return fmt.Errorf("missing sku")
	}

	stock, err := s.repo.GetStock(c.Request.Context(), sku)
	if err != nil {
		c.JSON(500, gin.H{"error": err.Error()})
		return err
	}

	c.JSON(200, gin.H{"sku": sku, "stock": stock})
	return nil
}
